description: App Store Connect for MCP clients: PPP pricing, subscriptions, TestFlight, reviews, reports & more
name: io.github.akoskomuves/appstoreconnect-mcp

environmentVariables.description: App Store Connect API issuer UUID (Users and Access > Integrations > Keys).
environmentVariables.name: ASC_ISSUER_ID

environmentVariables.description: 10-character App Store Connect API key ID.
environmentVariables.name: ASC_KEY_ID

environmentVariables.description: Path to the downloaded .p8 private key file (~ is expanded).
environmentVariables.name: ASC_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Account-level vendor number for the sales/finance report tools.
environmentVariables.name: ASC_VENDOR_NUMBER
